notes: TARIF 2025 (Autres) = TABLE_B (all other vessel types -- tanker falls here, not Antifer/Bougainville)
LOA 184m -> TABLE_B bracket 180-189.99m: rate = 2,648.36 per tug per service
2 tugs entry (VB FECAMP + VB YPORT) x 2,648.36 = 5,296.72
2 tugs departure (VB GASCOGNE + VB FECAMP) x 2,648.36 = 5,296.72
Bunker surcharge: 624.00 (SURCHARGE EXCEPTIONNELLE DE SOUTE -- variable fuel adjustment, not tariff-calculable)
No overtime: entry 50 min, departure ~30 min, both well under 2hr ZONE_2 standard allowance
VAT: 0% (EU VAT reverse charge -- French VAT exemption article 262-7e CGI)
